name: Socket for Open Source
description: The Socket for Open Source program offers a free Team plan to open source maintainers to protect their projects from supply chain attacks.

perks.title: Dependency Scanning
perks.description: Full dependency scanning across your project.

perks.title: Real-time Alerts
perks.description: Real-time alerts for malicious packages in your dependency tree.

perks.title: PR Security Checks
perks.description: Check every PR to ensure no malicious dependencies are added, including those from outside contributors.

eligibility: Must be an open source maintainer.
applicationProcess: Send an email to support[at]socket[dot]dev to get set up.
